_comment: Releases data for gileslamb.com. Grouped by type on the Releases page. Add new entries at the top of the relevant array. Covers are hotlinked from Bandcamp's CDN for now; migrate to local /public assets in a future pass if desired.

live.title: Orbital Fifths
live.description: Live improvisation, 18 May 2026, Glasgow. Single take, unedited.

albums.title: The Distance to the Moon
albums.subtitle: Original Motion Picture Soundtrack
albums.description: A soundtrack inspired by Italo Calvino's Cosmicomics. Reshaped by a stop-motion animation collaboration.

albums.title: Deep Blue Mind
albums.description: Binaural meditation for Haken Continuumini. Music made with eyes closed.

albums.title: Synthetic Dreams
albums.description: A machine emulating a human. Vocaloid, fragments, strings, piano.

albums.title: White Matter
albums.description: Modern classical for piano and string quartet. Birth, death, and the cycle between.

albums.title: Hope
albums.description: Cinematic scores augmented with electronic production. Emotive and experiential.

albums.title: Pure Frame
albums.description: Piano, voice, and modular synthesiser. A fractured sonic tableau with a melodic core.

albums.title: Acoust:OMA
albums.description: Piano quartet and electronics. The boundary between modern classical, electronic, and ambient.

albums.title: Glossolalia
albums.description: Evocative compositions including a condensed version of the Suilven score.

albums.title: Before the Birds
albums.description: Piano, viola, cello. Beautiful order transforming into mottled disarray.
